notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Marcus Semien. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Marcus Semien. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, third baseman Colt Emerson to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Patrick Wisdom. Jared Young out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Patrick Wisdom. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: MJ Melendez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: MJ Melendez grounds out sharply, third baseman Colt Emerson to first baseman Patrick Wisdom.
